scenes.description: Kiara, Ina, and Calli talking on stage after a performance, announcing the Fortune Spinner MV premiere and starting an award ceremony.
Takanashi Kiara receives her 'Most Meals Cooked Award' and gives a speech.
Ninomae Ina'nis receives her 'Most Time Spent on the Floor Award' and gives a speech.
Mori Calliope receives her 'Best Worst Luck Award' and starts a sappy speech.
